description: Heavy overnight rainfall caused waist-deep flooding at the underpass. Over 50 vehicles stranded. Water took 8 hours to recede.
Afternoon storm caused street-level flooding. Ankle to knee-deep water for 3 hours. Traffic rerouted through side streets.
Same storm system caused significant flooding at the underpass. Water level reached 60cm. Emergency services deployed.
Combined rainfall and high tide caused flooding across Victoria Island low-lying areas. Several offices evacuated.
Morning rain caused waterlogging at junction. Traffic gridlock for 4 hours. No vehicles stranded but many turned back.
Worst flooding event in 2 years. Water exceeded 1 meter at underpass. Multiple rescues by emergency services. Road closed for 18 hours.
Extended rainfall over 6 hours caused persistent flooding. Water slow to drain due to blocked drainage channels.
Preventive road closure due to weather forecast. Underpass closed for 12 hours as precaution.
Flash flooding after sudden downpour. Multiple vehicles submerged. Traffic diverted for 6 hours.
Flooding damaged electrical substation. Power outage affected Lekki Phase 1 for 14 hours.
